text: Nvidia CEO Joins Trump’s China Trip as Last-Minute Addition - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Nvidia Corp. co-founder Jensen Huang joined US President Donald Trump on his visit to China as a last-minute addition, thrusting AI and technology into the spotlight before a high-stakes Beijing summit.

text: Some Japanese snack packages are turning black-and-white as Iran war depletes ink supply - AP News

text: Donald Gibb, ‘Revenge of the Nerds’ and ‘Bloodsport’ Actor, Dies at 71 - Variety
fullText: Donald Gibb, who appeared in 'Revenge of the Nerds' and 'Bloodsport,' has died. He was 71.

text: Sons of Kouri Richins, author convicted of murdering husband, say they'd feel unsafe if she wasn't in prison - CBS News
fullText: Prosecutors said Kouri Richins laced her husband's cocktail with five times the lethal dose of fentanyl in 2022.

text: Memphis Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke, a veteran of 7 NBA seasons, dies at 29 - AP News

text: Sony’s new Xperia phone gets an overdue redesign - The Verge
fullText: The Sony Xperia 1 VIII gets a new look with a refreshed square camera module, but still no US release.

text: South Carolina Republicans block plan to eliminate Clyburn’s House seat - The Washington Post
fullText: Rep. James E. Clyburn has long been a power broker in the Democratic Party. A state Senate leader had warned that a new map could backfire for the GOP.

text: Democrats pick Nebraska Senate nominee who could drop out and back independent Dan Osborn - NBC News
fullText: Cindy Burbank won the Democratic Senate primary in Nebraska, NBC News projects, potentially clearing the way for independent Dan Osborn to take on GOP Sen.

text: Amid war, Trump says he doesn’t ‘think about Americans’ financial situation’ - The Washington Post
fullText: Trump said he is only concerned about Iran not having a nuclear weapon. “I don’t think about anybody,” he added.

text: Hayden Panettiere's ex reacts to domestic abuse claims in her memoir - Entertainment Weekly
fullText: Hayden Panettiere's ex-boyfriend, Brian Hickerson, reacts to her memoir, 'This Is Me: A Reckoning,' and reveals domestic abuse story he asked to be cut out (but it wasn't).

text: FBI Director Kash Patel denies drinking allegations in heated Senate exchange - AP News

text: Asia markets mixed as investors watch Trump-Xi meeting and Iran tensions - CNBC
fullText: Asian markets mixed on Wednesday as investors grappled with hotter-than-expected inflation, U.S.-Iran tensions and U.S.-China trade talks.

text: Jamie Foxx Is Expecting His Third Child - The Cut
fullText: Jamie Foxx is going to be a dad for the third time. The actor is expecting his first child with girlfriend Alyce Huckstepp.
